content:
Welcome to the Dataverse2026 internal channel!

This is a dedicated space for us to coordinate the logistics, scheduling, and internal details for the upcoming conference.
What to use this channel for:

  • Finalizing venue arrangements for the World Trade Center and BSC.
    • Reviewing attendee materials (like the Mobility and Gastronomic guides).
    • Real-time coordination during the satellite meetings and the Dataverse Cup.
    • Internal Q&A and quick updates.
